attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 DRVD.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 DRVD.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 DRVD.BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 DRVD.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME,
 DRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,DRVD.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,DRVD.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,DRVD.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM(
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                  ,
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY  BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY   ,
 WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  ,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */  
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */  
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_BUNDLE WGMB
 WHERE WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME NOT IN 
 (SELECT NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS 
 WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 AND REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ','DRCT_AS_T')  /*  DRCT_AS_T is added as part of June release 2012 */
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                  ,
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY  BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY   ,
 WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  ,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */ 
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */  
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_BUNDLE WGMB
 WHERE WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME NOT IN 
 (SELECT NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS 
 WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME FROM  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 WHERE BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 AND WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('AR', 'POS', 'SLS_ADJ','RCE_ADJ') /* Jeramasa: Added as part of Royalty Phase II Project Q3FY16 */
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ATTR_GL_REV_MEASURE NIRM
 WHERE WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 ) 
 )DRVD

SELECT 
 DRVD.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 DRVD.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 DRVD.BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 DRVD.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME,
 DRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,DRVD.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,DRVD.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,DRVD.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM(
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT   ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB. EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB. EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_BUNDLE WGMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 ON(WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME AND BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON (RP. ITEM_KEY= NHBPS.PRODUCT_KEY)
 WHERE WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ','DRCT_AS_T') /*  DRCT_AS_T is added as part of june release 2012 */
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBPS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT   ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB. EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB. EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBPS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_BUNDLE WGMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_PRD_SPLT NHBPS
 ON(WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBPS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME AND BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON (RP. ITEM_KEY= NHBPS.PRODUCT_KEY)
 WHERE WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('AR', 'POS', 'SLS_ADJ','RCE_ADJ') /* Jeramasa: Added as part of Royalty Phase II Project Q3FY16 */
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ATTR_GL_REV_MEASURE NIRM
 WHERE WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 ) 
 ) DRVD

SELECT 
 DRVD.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 DRVD.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.ATTRIBUTED_FLG                  ,
 DRVD.BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 DRVD.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME,
 DRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,DRVD.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,DRVD.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,DRVD.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM(
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'N' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                  ,
 /* WGMB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY , */ 
 CASE WHEN WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' THEN WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE WGMB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY, /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 'UNKNOWN' AS BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_NON_BUNDLE WGMB
 WHERE REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ','DRCT_AS_T') /*  DRCT_AS_T is added as part of June release 2012 */
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'N' ATTRIBUTED_FLG                  ,
 /* WGMB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY , */
 CASE WHEN WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' THEN WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE WGMB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY, /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
 'UNKNOWN' AS BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_NON_BUNDLE WGMB
 WHERE WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('AR', 'POS', 'SLS_ADJ','RCE_ADJ') /* Jeramasa: Added as part of Royalty Phase II Project Q3FY16 */
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ATTR_GL_REV_MEASURE NIRM
 WHERE WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD) 
 ) DRVD

SELECT 
 DRVD.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 DRVD.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
 DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 DRVD.ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 DRVD.BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 DRVD.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 DRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */ 
 ,DRVD.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,DRVD.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 ,DRVD.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,DRVD.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM(
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT   ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER        ,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME   ,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE 
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_BUNDLE WGMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
 ON(WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME AND BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRIM(NHBFS.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)||'_ADJ_PROD'
 WHERE WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ','DRCT_AS_T')  /*  DRCT_AS_T is added as part of June release 2012 */
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
 WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 RP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,                   
 WGMB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WGMB.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100     DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT      ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT  * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT    ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100   DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT  ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT *NHBFS.COGS_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT   ,
 WGMB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100  DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_CREATE_USER        ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME            ,
 WGMB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'Y' ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,            
 WGMB.PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WGMB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /* OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WGMB.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */ 
,WGMB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WGMB.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,WGMB.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE * NHBFS.BOOKINGS_REVENUE_SPLIT_PCT/100 as DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE 
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_BUNDLE WGMB
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BNDL_TYP_FMLY_SPLT NHBFS
 ON(WGMB.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME= NHBFS.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME AND BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
 ON RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TRIM(NHBFS.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID)||'_ADJ_PROD'
 WHERE WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('AR', 'POS', 'SLS_ADJ','RCE_ADJ') /* Jeramasa: Added as part of Royalty Phase II Project Q3FY16 */
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ATTR_GL_REV_MEASURE NIRM
 WHERE WGMB.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=NIRM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
 AND WGMB.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=NIRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 ) 
 ) DRVD
